prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业在 2024–2026 年专业热度分析中均为「高热推荐」或「推荐」，新疆大学物理类招生专业涵盖上述热门方向，且 2026 年大幅扩招这些专业，可能吸引更多考生关注；安徽省物理类考生 2021–2025 年分别为 232461→286062→298845→313412→320779，持续增长，2026 年总考生 451000 人，按近年物理类占比约 69.5% 估算约 31.4 万人，较 2025 年略有减少，略有下降；新疆大学位于新疆乌鲁木齐，与安徽省跨省距离远，本地考生报考意愿受地域偏好影响较大；该校在安徽省招生占比约 2.8%（2025 年），属跨省招生中占比偏低的学校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 67357 名、2026 年物理类计划大幅扩招约 42.7%（缓解竞争）、安徽省物理类考生略有减少（约 31.4 万）、热门工科专业扩招可能吸引更多关注但学校地处偏远等因素，但考虑到扩招幅度极大而考生基数变化有限，实际竞争不会如理论值那般宽松，适度回调后预测最低位次约 84107 名，区间 83607–84607 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) fluctuated significantly: 33869 → 96576 → 62835 → 52506 → 67357. In 2022, an abnormal high ranking occurred due to changes in exam difficulty. In the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated within the range of 52506–67357, with a baseline of approximately 67357 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 79 in 2021, 83 in 2022, 76 in 2023, 84 in 2024, and 82 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increased to 117, an expansion of about 42.7% compared to 2025, substantially increasing admission slots and theoretically easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 131st in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating between 127 and 136, overall stable at an upper-middle level. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 72nd, with a rating of 'average' and a comprehensive popularity of about 380,000, with no significant viral events. Historical admission anomaly records show no irregularities for Xinjiang University, indicating no obvious negative or positive psychological disturbance in the application process.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, etc., were rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis. Xinjiang University's Physics Category enrollment includes these popular directions, and the significant expansion in 2026 for these majors may attract more candidates' attention. The number of Physics Category candidates in Anhui Province from 2021 to 2025 was 232461 → 286062 → 298845 → 313412 → 320779, showing continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates is 451,000, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 69.5%, approximately 314,000, slightly decreasing compared to 2025. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, Xinjiang, far from Anhui Province, so local candidates' willingness to apply is significantly influenced by geographical preferences. The university's enrollment proportion in Anhui Province is about 2.8% (2025), which is relatively low among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 67357, the significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment by about 42.7% in 2026 (easing competition), the slight decrease in Anhui Physics Category candidates (about 314,000), and the expansion of popular engineering majors that may attract more attention but the remote location of the university, the actual competition will not be as loose as the theoretical value suggests. After moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 84107, with a range of 83607–84607.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 83607–84607, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<83607), prioritize applying for the Electrical Engineering joint training program and Computer Science and other popular majors. For rankings near the upper limit (>84607), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors for stability.
